skills.name: blog_summarize
skills.description: Summarize content and submit to blog as MDX. Analyzes content from a professional developer perspective, including background, personal thinking, and AI-specific insights. Uses first-person voice for findings, summaries, and suggestions.

title.description: Optional article title. Defaults to 'AI Builders Digest YYYY-MM-DD'

skills.returns: SkillResult with success status and file path

skills.name: create_skill_demo
skills.description: Generate a new skill template file for agent imitation. Creates a new skill file in gowork/ with @register() decorator and standard Skill base class implementation.

name.description: Name of the new skill (used for class name and filename)

skills.returns: SkillResult with the generated file path
